name: Insigma Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Insigma Technology Co., Ltd. operates as an information technology consulting and service company in China. The company offers architecture design, software development, software and hardware integration, business process outsourcing, operation and maintenance, cloud computing, big data, artificial intelligence generation, and contracting engineering services. It serves industries, such as big traffic, big financial, big health, and case show. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Natural Technology Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Insigma Technology Co., Ltd. in 2001. Insigma Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
